calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Austin, Appellant/Defendant
Anthony Castill, Respondent/Plaintiff

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

The case is submitted for Court's ruling. Based on the evidence before the court, judgment is entered in favor of the Plaintiff/Respondent Anthony Castillo and against Appellant/Defendant Michael Austin in the total amount of $3,323.34.

All exhibits are ordered returned to submitting parties at the conclusion of the hearing.

Judge Newton J. Lam, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (D606)
